title: Tower T843095 Square Air Fryer Tray with Divider (2.5L), Suitable for Most Air Fryers 6 litres and Above Including Ninja, Reusable Silicone Liner, Black
features: SOLID SQUARE SILICONE TRAY WITH DIVIDER: Perfect for use in any 6 litre Tower air fryer or oven, and also suitable for Ninja, Instant and Tefal models of a similar size. The divider allows you to cook multiple food types at once, so you can cook crispy chips and succulent, moist chicken simultaneously, saving time in the kitchen. The vertical handles and sturdy body mean you can lift the tray out of the air fryer with ease.

100% FOOD SAFE: All Tower air fryer accessories are reusable and carefully constructed from BPA free eco-friendly materials to be kinder to the environment, whilst they are also LFGB certified thanks to odourless and non-toxic silicone

VERSATILE COOKING: The trays are heat resistant up to 240°C, so they can even be used in a conventional oven, microwave, fridge and freezer for full cooking versatility. It is also safe to use metal utensils, excluding sharp edges, without risking damage to the trays

DISHWASHER SAFE: The slick silicone body is ideal for easy food release, whilst they are also dishwasher friendly for fuss-free cleaning. The silicone trays ensure air fryer cleaning is kept to a minimum and are collapsible for easy storage between uses.
5 YEAR GUARANTEE: Trusted Tower quality with a standard 1 year guarantee and optional 4 year extension, subject to product registration online
description: From the manufacturer PERFECT FOR FAMILY MEALTIMES Create deliciously healthy meals with these foldable trays from Tower This Square Silicone Tray fits most air fryers 6 litres and above. Crafted from superior non-stick silicone, the ribbed base collects oil to provide better air circulation. Safely lift the tray using the side handles - the sturdy silicone stays in shape, keeping contents in place. The divider allows you to cook multiple foods at once to save you time in the kitchen. A reusable alternative to single use parchment liners, made from 100% food-safe silicone odourless and non-toxic. Previous page COOK MULTIPLE FOOD TYPES The divider section in the tray will let you cook multiple food types at once, so you can cook crispy chips and succulent, moist chicken simultaneously, saving time in the kitchen EVEN HEAT DISTRIBUTION The internal ridges in each tray elevate foods out of oils and cooking juices for a more even coating, resulting in more flavoursome meals. Even heat distribution allows more thorough cooking. SIDE HANDLES Side handles make it easier to lift trays out of the air fryer for added safety. The sealed base allows for a greater choice of delicious recipes, such as pasta bakes, succulent pies or juicy crumbles VERSATILE COOKING The trays are heat resistant up to 240°C so they can be used in a conventional oven or microwave. They are also suitable for use in the fridge/freezer, offering a plethora of cooking options 100% FOOD SAFE All Tower air fryer accessories are sturdy reusable silicone.
